description: An official letter or statement verifying an individual's recurring pension distribution details, usually issued by an employer or retirement board.

pensioner_name.instruction: The full name of the retired employee receiving the pension benefit.

issuing_organization.instruction: The name of the company, union, or government entity paying out the pension.

gross_payout_amount.instruction: The total gross dollar amount of the pension benefit before taxes or deductions are removed.

payout_frequency.instruction: The recurrence interval of the pension payment, typically Monthly.

benefit_start_date.instruction: The date the pension payments officially commenced or the date of the most recent cost-of-living adjustment.
